title: FAMILY RESOURCE MANAGER - 211info
text: EARLY CHILDHOOD FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER FAMILY RESOURCE MANAGER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one information and referrals to families about early learning, parenting support, basic needs, and health. Provides information about and hosts play groups, parenting classes, and early learning workshops. In class, parents have an opportunity to interact with each other and boost their parenting skills while learning nurturing strategies to support their children at home and in school. 200 N 14th Avenue Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-6 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 359-8817 5504 - .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 359-8117 Ext: 5504 Main phone Main phone (503) 359-8817 ext 5504 Michelle Ornelas-zepeda [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Forest Grove School District Services: Children's Play Groups Family Support Centers/Outreach Parent to Parent Networking Parenting Skills Classes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EARLY CHILDHOOD FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER
